content.text: How can I implement a generic method to execute configurable HTTP requests using parameters stored in an internal object attribute?
What if I set `self.data['auth']` as a tuple like ('base64_string') instead of letting the function split a colon-separated string?
The current logic expects a string and attempts to split it using `.split(':', 1);`, so passing an existing tuple would result in a TypeError when method is called.
Got it, I should make sure my data structure is correctly formatted for the splitting logic.
